P1 Assess: SOI Down + Spend Down — Deep Dive

Accounts: BITOOL, KINGSGROUP, EssentialsTech, MICO, Last Z (iOS), LEMON8, SPEELEAD, BYTEDANCEPTE, Lands of Jail (Madhouse), NetEase, Dark War Survival (Madhouse), RIVERGAME_HK
Period: Benchmark (Dec 25-31, 2025) → Mar 1-13, 2026
Criteria: Both avg daily spend AND SOI declined in March vs Benchmark
Key question: Is this intentional budget reallocation, seasonal pullback, or early churn signal? For accounts with sharp Moloco install drops, check for campaign pauses, creative fatigue, or budget shifts to other channels.
SOI: Account/app level = naive sum(Moloco) / sum(all installs). Multi-account = spend-weighted.

Contents
  1. BITOOL
  2. KINGSGROUP
  3. EssentialsTech
  4. MICO
  5. Last Z (iOS)
  6. LEMON8
  7. SPEELEAD
  8. BYTEDANCEPTE
  9. Lands of Jail (Madhouse)
  10. NetEase
  11. Dark War Survival (Madhouse)
  12. RIVERGAME_HK
